commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5116e7e327e923f87ee53b72c804d2f64a79416e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Workboard controller/view regressions and introduces a UI-side manual status override so card edits, select values, and drag-to-running moves survive lifecycle sync.

PR surface: Source +39, Tests +94. Total +133 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: a same-status `moveWorkboardCard` call can mark the card manual, and the next lifecycle target can then be skipped. I did not run a live browser reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed because the PR has a narrow code blocker and lacks real Control UI behavior proof; this should not proceed as an automated repair while proof is missing.

target.title: Fix Workboard card status persistence
target.body:
Fixes #88592

Real behavior proof:
- Added controller regressions proving an explicit edit-modal status save to `running` and a drag-to-`running` move are not immediately rewritten by stale linked-session lifecycle sync.
- Added view regression proving returned card state is reflected after save and still appears when the edit modal is reopened.
- Re-ran focused UI tests after rebasing onto latest upstream/main: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/workboard.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts` passed.
- Earlier store/gateway workboard coverage also passed: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/workboard/src/store.test.ts extensions/workboard/src/gateway.test.ts`.
- `git diff --check` passed.

@clawsweeper re-review
target.author: turbotheturtle

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
